svg.text: Using ellipse perimeter for progressive drawing Script // we get radius of ellipse node = evt.target.ownerDocument.getElementById('ellipse') rx = parseFloat(node.getAttributeNS(null , "rx")) ry = parseFloat(node.getAttributeNS(null , "ry")) // Calcul of perimeter perimeter = Math.sqrt( 2 * (rx * rx + ry * ry ) ) * Math.PI // Affect this value for stroke-dasharray and stroke-dashoffset node.setAttributeNS(null , 'stroke-dasharray' , perimeter.toString() + " " + perimeter.toString() ) node.setAttributeNS(null , 'stroke-dashoffset' , perimeter.toString() ) // Affect this value for from in animate element evt.target.ownerDocument.getElementById('anime1').setAttributeNS(null , 'from' , perimeter.toString() ) SVG objects < ellipse id="ellipse" cx="350" cy="450" rx="150" ry="80" stroke="blue" fill="lime" fill-opacity="0" > < animate id="anime1" attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" to="0" dur="5s" begin="go.click" fill="freeze"/> </ellipse>
